reason: A vascular surgeon framed for murder uses everyday medical knowledge to survive and clear his name.
A clueless tourist mistaken for a spy relies on quick wits and common sense in a real espionage plot.
An advertising executive is swept into an international spy conspiracy and survives on logic and luck.
A systems analyst uncovers a cyber conspiracy and uses mundane tech skills to evade deadly forces.
A New York cab driver and conspiracy theorist finds himself in a real covert operation, banking on street smarts.
An ordinary accountant must kill a politician to save his daughter, using nothing but calm nerves and ingenuity.
A computer manager becomes entangled in a corporate plot and fights back using everyday office know-how.
A young lawyer falls into a TV quiz show rigging scheme and must survive with legal savvy and courtroom tactics.
An investment banker’s harmless birthday game turns into a real-life conspiracy, and he relies on business acumen.
A former soldier uncovers a brainwashing plot and navigates it through honor and intuition rather than combat expertise.
